review_title: Beautiful Slidedeck Requires Less Effort than PowerPoint
description: I started as a free user before they had a pricing model. With the expanded templates, object feature, and other improvements, it is a no brainer to justify the $12-15/month subscription because it will easily save you hours of time on each presentation.
author: Perryn O.
pros: The templates make it easy to create great looking slides with a touch of animation. I develop 30-40 slides within a few hours with universal styling and by comparison, that would take me 1.5 days in PowerPoint and I'd spend most of that time standardizing the styling since PowerPoint's autosizing makes two slides look vastly different.
cons: Occasionally, you want to nudge something and the template does not allow for that. This aggravation is minor and it happens much less frequently with the addition of their text boxes and objects feature. I recommend finalizing your content before you start working on an animated order (e.g. bulleted lists) because if you reorder the content, it keeps the same order you originally set.

review_title: Great presentations for a very small cost
author: Silvia B.
pros: It took me away from PowerPoint offering a set of features that are both smart and productive. In the beginning, I was annoyed by the fact that the software had some "forced" constraints to help avoid cluttering the page, but as I used the product I learned to produce better presentations and to be a better presenter. I love the templates - for a whole presentation or just a page - and the set of images and media available is great. You can configure your templates and you can have a team area for collaboration
cons: sometimes it gets sluggish on my computer and sometimes the old presentations need to be changed because the template has changed.

review_title: Dismissive Support, Delayed Responses, an No Escalation for Long-Time Customer
description: I was a paying customer at $50 per month for several years. Recently, I discovered that the same service is now offered at $12 per month and reached out to ask about renewal options. I was not requesting retroactive refunds - only clarification. At the same time, I was unable to access downloads tied to my account and contacted support for help. The responses I received were dismissive and did not resolve the access issue. I was offered promotional pricing, but when I attempted to enroll, I did not receive timely support. By the time I followed up again, the promotional rate had expired. I also requested escalation regarding both the access issue and the pricing concern, and that request was not advanced. Pricing changes are a business decision. My concern is how this situation was handled - particularly the lack of resolution, delayed responses, and refusal to escalate a long-term customer inquiry. Prospective customers may want to consider how support concerns are addressed before committing.
author: Shannon S.
pros: The interface is easy to use, although not significantly different than other products on the market now.
cons: Overall, the product is easy to use, but you must depend on self-education to maximize the use of the product.

review_title: Quick, ease of deployment and smart integration.
description: Just like the name, Beautiful.ai results into beautiful work. Easy to use and professional.
author: Olivia W.
pros: Beautiful.ai brought the change everyone desires. Being AI powered technology, it is fast and very accurate. I have enjoyed creating slides in a flexible manner and at the end, the results is smart and modern. Cheers to the dashboard which is well designed to beat any need for visual documents. It is very adaptive to the changing world.
cons: No frustrations. I have every benefits on my fingertips first hand. It generates presentable and we'll organized documents slides.

review_title: Your presentations become more attractive and professional with Beautiful.AI.
description: I have used Beautiful.ai extensively for a long time, and it has been very helpful, especially when I struggle to choose presentation templates or font colors, etc. Beautiful.ai provides me with easy and perfectly tailored suggestions.
author: Souleymane D.
pros: What I prefer is that its design system is assisted by artificial intelligence, which provides us with a wide range of presentation options. It suggests suitable layouts, fonts, colors, and images based on the presentation content. Moreover, it offers a variety of professional slides tailored to the desired presentations.
cons: The only negative aspect is perhaps that we are obliged to trust the algorithm for the presentations, which means we rely on artificial intelligence to create them instead of creating them ourselves. This can be seen as a negative point.

review_title: Easiest and Fastest Way to make Slides for work
description: As a start up founder, time is always on premium and Beautiful.ai helped our team spend less time on making the slides look good and freed us to focus on the content. And now with its advanced sharing and analytics it’s become a very important part of our sales tech stack. Amazing product that is delivering amazing value to us everyday.
author: Satwick S.
pros: It’s super easy to use and helps you have a professional looking slide deck ready in jiffy. No more tinkering around with formatting and stuff. Finally the freedom to just focus on the content and not formatting. Plus it’s additional features to share and track analytics make it a must have for sales teams.
cons: A few new features are not so obvious but once you discover them they are super easy to use.

review_title: Best way to back slide decks
description: I speak at conferences multiple times a month and need slide decks that support my messaging, this tool does that for me. I normally only have a hour or two to take all my content and turn it into a finalized deck and Beautiful.ai delivers.
author: Mike D.
pros: I love the fact I can knock out stunning presentations in a matter of minutes that I get compliments for all the time. The process is simple and the designs fit most every situation.
cons: I have found when trying to have people collaborate on a deck that I am working on complain why I am not just using PowerPoint so I have very little team members who even want to accept the edit invites. I also wish editing colors was easier.

review_title: Good functionality but not a game changer for presenting
description: I am still trying its features and capabilities, but for the moment I cannot say that I would be creating a presentation with a "made with xyz" logo.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1.Its available templates and themes that can offer you a jumpstart 2. Smart editing into the templates - adding elements of the template without having to spend time aligning or copy-paste graphics
cons: 1. Very limited actions in the trial plan do not let you adopt the app for your presentation. 2. I do not see the pricing offered as competitive vs other available solutions 3. Learning curve and limited trial push you to another solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Love the ease of making presentations
description: i make my all presentations for weekly team sync, quarterly reviews with business with b.ai
author: Anshul Raj K.
pros: The intuitiveness of the product is the key.
cons: it would be great if we can imbed videos here as well,
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Over-designed at the expense of clarity.
description: My experience was very disappointing dealing with customer service support. I got caught in a loop of trying to cancel the account but did not have access to the email that I used to sign up for a year prior. They charged me for another entire year even though I reached out days before the renewal.
author: Marcia C.
pros: The slides can be made to look quite impressive. Very sleek! The design templates were fairly use-friendly.
cons: ADA requirements for visual disabilities are key in my industry. These slides looked sleek, but the design choices made them hard to read during the presentation even for the average person.

review_title: Reaching the apex of success with Beautiful.ai , the best software you can ever get.
description: Before I started using software ,used to make a lot of errors, delayed presentations,and the cost was too high.I used to waste slot of money in my presentations, but Beautiful.ai has been a life changer for me.I would recommend it for everyone else who wants to scale into new heights of success with this incredible software.
author: Myra M.
pros: This is the secret catalyst to smart working.It is a great product which is easy to use,no unnecessary tags it is coed to perfection nothing less.Have been using it in building my presentations and it has magnified it's excellent work on my results.It is cost effective and has this amazing features that helps you to slide automatically.
cons: No cons for this incredible software.It is ideally suited to the demands of modern working experience.It has been a game changer in my work.

review_title: Great Product, Truly Creates Beautiful Slides
author: Alexa L.
pros: Beautiful.ai integrates easily into any company's software ecosystem. It makes creating beautiful slides simple and easy.
cons: I wish that the offline viewer allowed you to play videos. Currently, the only way to play videos from a Beautiful.ai presentation is to be connected to the internet.

review_title: Rivals Powerpoint
description: Regardless of the things that I don't like about Beautiful.ai, I feel like the pros outweigh the cons. It has made my life so much easier in terms of making slides, organizing them, and finding them easily. I make a lot of presentations not only for my own use in meetings, but for the head of my organization, so being able to create them fluidly and efficiently has been invaluable to me. I would strongly recommend Beautiful.ai to anyone who makes a lot of slides for their work.
author: Cyndi G.
pros: Having all of my slides in one place, being able to make folders and organize them is one of my favorite features. The ability to copy slides from other presentations easily is also a big plus. Since Beautiful.ai came out with the templates for each kind of slide that's also been a game changer in ease of use and efficiency in making a slide deck fast and beautiful.
cons: If I had to pick something I didn't like it would be the way slides are converted to Powerpoint. The fonts don't match up in what Powerpoint has so when I do have to convert slides to Powerpoint it takes me a really long time, also every little thing in Beautiful.ai is converted as a shape, like bullet points, so if you're adding things to a slide that's been converted, it can take a lot of time to move things around just the way you like. Lastly, I am not a fan of how text is clipped in text boxes, I wish it would just resize the font to fit the text in the text boxes rather than cap you at a text limit.
author_profession: Director of Finance, Administration & Strategic Inititatives

review_title: Beautiful.AI Review
author: Yin L.
pros: Easy to use and beautiful design and ready to use slides
cons: Compatibility with PPT which means the convertible format of some my presentations can not be edited under PPT format or the words do not match original design

review_title: Great collaboration tool!
author: Candace R.
pros: Easy to set up teams and crest material together.
cons: It’s hard to reuse slides between presentations. I can’t copy or move slides between all presentations of the library.

review_title: The Best Presentation Tool Ever Made
description: After using it, you won't be using PowerPoint ever again!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With the tool, everyone can create amazing presentations. Because it's using the rules of good design, it does all the graphic design decisions for you, and the results are just beautiful.
cons: embedding videos in the presentation lacks many options like trimming videos and importing your own files.

review_title: it seems great at first, a bit too highly opinionated
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: when just need slide deck quick is great
cons: no option to tune things -- can use this template or that template, but options are hit & miss

review_title: Nice Alternative for powerpoint.
description: The online alternative to powerpoint gives me the ability to work faster and with any type of pc. It is still in testing and no price is given which is a gamble to work with.
author: Debjit B.
pros: I just install essential software on my pc, but this service is really interesting. I see this as my alternative to powerpoint presentation online. Powerpoint is a great tool no doubt but this is handy when working online and not using your work machine. I love when this app takes all hard work at the server and give me a clean slate to start. The free images are another interesting part, it eliminates to search for download and using in my powerpoint. Export to pdf and private sharing helps me to work more securely.
cons: This is still in beta phase and doesn't know the pricing or my projects will be available in the free account in future. No clear message.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A hidden gem for the Presenter in you!
description: Overall, Beautiful.AI has a lot of potential. It disrupts the ever so reliable and staple Powerpoint, which has really improved a lot, so I guess Beautiful has a lot of catching up to do!
author: Mike Lester R.
pros: Beautiful.AI is one of my recent discoveries and it is truly a gem of a find. I am used to finding Powerpoint templates and now I can use the power of Artificial Intelligence to design me a presentation that sells, persuades, and markets for me! I can quickly create a beautiful presentation in less time.
cons: What I least liked about the software is that it is just not Powerpoint, and it is not as easy to sell the idea that quickly. Some users I introduce the software to has not been able to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Beautifying your presentations - The AI way
description: We needed a quick, web-based and a free presentation software that could make some amazing slides. And Beautiful.AI was exactly that. I'm glad we started using this software.
author: Binigya D.
pros: I love the UI and the UX of Beautiful.AI. It is really easy to create slick, professional slides in just a few steps. Beautiful.AI provides some nifty tools to make your slides really pop, in a minimalistic fashion. And to top it off, it is free to get started.
cons: I wish there were more features, such as more animations and more layout options. I also do not like that it has reduced the features available to free users over a period of time.

review_title: You shouldn't stress about how your presentation look, honestly.
author: Esther M.
pros: What I love the most about this software is how simple they have made it easy for us to only focus on content rather than how the presentation look. Oftentimes, I've found myself spending more time tweaking the design of my presentation rather than the content. Beautiful.ai is heaven sent.
cons: Nothing really. The software really has everything to make any presentation successful. The trial really give you a taste about what they've got to offer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Terrible refund policy
author: Andrii C.
pros: Looks nice at the first glance. But still
cons: Stay away from Beautiful.ai. It might look fancy and attractive on the outside, but my experience was anything but beautiful. I signed up for a free trial, decided it wasn’t for me, and cancelled. You’d think that would be the end of it, right? Wrong. They went ahead and charged me not once, but twice. When I reached out to their support team for help and a refund, they flatly refused.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Beautiful.ai makes your presentations IMPACTFUL
description: Very great way to build a deck. Experienced some slow downs and glitches due to connectivity it seems.
author: Brock R.
pros: Easily creating eye catching slides that tell our story
cons: Some text editing options seemed to be missing, had to work around some pre-built configurations. A slide template had the text bottom aligned, but I couldn't figure out how to centre the text using that template - inserted additional cells to create the centred text look
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: horrible customer service
author: Jk S.
pros: good functionalitygood looking presentation
cons: this is what they wrote: "For the Table template, you should be able to paste your data directly into the table. Are you having any trouble with copy/pasting?"
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: good but pricey and limited options
description: Pretty nice but I"m not sure I would use it if I had Powerpoint
author: julie L.
pros: the them set up that make the conception of all the slides way easier
cons: the price and the lack of flexibility of the templates
